$comment: Pass 1a triage — categorized from prior knowledge + booth tier, ZERO web research. All records pre_verification:true. verdict 'identify' = unknown/unclear name needing a cheap one-shot lookup (Pass 1b) before a real verdict. Funding/valuation NEVER asserted here (T3-only, deferred to Pass 2). Confidence reflects certainty of the verdict, not of the facts.

verdict_legend.kill: strip out now — me-too / off-thesis / non-vendor; defensible at this confidence
verdict_legend.watch: real product or known incumbent, not the story
verdict_legend.identify: unknown — needs Pass 1b cheap lookup before verdict
